title: Flea Treatment in Cedarhurst, NY | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Cedarhurst, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Cedarhurst home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Cedarhurst and the Five Towns area. Our experienced technicians use advanced, pet-safe treatments to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy a flea-free environment.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Long Island communities, we understand the unique pest challenges faced by Cedarhurst residents. Our licensed exterminators provide same-day service, use family-safe products, and back our flea treatments with a satisfaction guarantee to give you complete peace of mind.
localContext: Cedarhurst's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Cedarhurst Park make it a beautiful community, but they also create ideal conditions for flea problems, especially in homes with pets. Whether you live in one of the charming single-family homes near Central Avenue or in an apartment complex, our tailored flea treatment solutions protect your property year-round.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Cedarhurst range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas in all life stages. We offer follow-up treatments as needed to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against fleas but safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, then they can safely return.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes! We understand that flea infestations require immediate attention. We offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Cedarhurst and surrounding Five Towns communities, subject to availability. Call us early for the best chance of same-day scheduling.
